title: picralima elliotii
intro: Picralima elliotii, also known as Unyame or Kola Ede, is a tropical plant native to the West African region, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Picralima elliotii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Picralima elliotii can be found in various forms, such as dried leaves, bark, and root extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to create teas, infusions, and ointments.
